questions.text: The SI unit of temperature is:
questions.explanation: Kelvin (K) is the SI unit of temperature. 0 K = -273.15°C

questions.text: Heat transfer by convection requires a medium.
questions.explanation: Convection requires a material medium (liquid or gas) for heat transfer. Radiation does not require medium.

questions.text: The specific heat capacity of water is ________ J/kg·K.
questions.explanation: Specific heat capacity of water is 4186 J/kg·K (approximately 4200 J/kg·K)

questions.correctAnswer: The total energy radiated per unit surface area of a black body is proportional to T⁴. E = σT⁴
questions.explanation: Stefan-Boltzmann law: E = σT⁴, where σ is Stefan-Boltzmann constant (5.67×10^-8 W/m²K⁴)
